name: Fuel card suspended for unusual activity (fear + urgency)
subject: Action needed: fuel card **** 4471 suspended (unusual charge)
trucking_context: Drivers depend on their fuel card to keep moving; a suspended card stranded at a pump is an immediate operational threat that drives panic-clicks, and Comdata / EFS / WEX impersonation has been reported widely.
indicators: Sender domain comdata-driver-portal.net is not comdata.com
Fuel-card vendors typically alert via SMS or in-app notification, not generic email links
Asks for company login on a non-company domain
Fake transaction details (TA Effingham at 03:14) are easy to fabricate but cannot be verified without the card vendor's real app
